deliverables.name: System Prompt v4.0
deliverables.description: Complete rewrite with 3 pathways (Explorer/Builder/Challenger), 3 new modes (Troubleshoot/Compare/Onboard), Master Pattern integration, anti-pattern blockers, emotional detection, technical calibration, competitive framework, and edge case handling. 2,231 words (~3,600 tokens).

deliverables.name: Webhook Updates
deliverables.description: Updated firstMessage with 3-way pathway routing, expanded Deepgram keywords to 22 entries (added competitor names, key concepts), added 'competitor_comparison' to topic taxonomy. Builds clean at 1,189 lines.

deliverables.name: Knowledge Index Regeneration
deliverables.description: Regenerated to 98 entries (was 93). Includes all 5 D3 files: community-use-cases, competitive-landscape, messaging-cheat-sheet, idealism-talking-points, gap-analysis-d3. Dynamic index auto-discovered by explainConcept.

deliverables.name: Daily Analysis Enhancement
deliverables.description: Added analyze_messaging_effectiveness() function that reads tool_usage.jsonl, correlates explainConcept topics and tool patterns with call duration and satisfaction. Integrated into daily report with new 'Messaging Effectiveness' section. Syntax-verified.

deliverables.name: System Prompt v3.0 Backup
deliverables.description: Backup of the D1-trimmed prompt before v4.0 rewrite.

design_decisions.prompt_expansion_rationale: D2 confirmed Haiku 4.5 token budget is comfortable. Expanding from 901 to 2231 words adds ~2700 tokens at ~$0.003/call — negligible cost for substantially richer conversational intelligence.
design_decisions.no_new_tools: All new behavior (pathways, modes, emotional detection, competitive responses) wired into the system prompt rather than new tools. Haiku 4.5 excels at nuanced instruction following — leveraging this is cheaper and more natural than adding tool calls.
design_decisions.concept_mapping_automatic: D1's dynamic index architecture means D3's 5 new files are automatically discoverable via explainConcept after index regeneration. No hardcoded mapping needed.
design_decisions.three_way_routing_in_greeting: Updated firstMessage to include 'comparing Zo to another tool' as a third routing option, directly exposing the Challenger pathway entrance.

verification.assistant_request_test: passed — returns updated firstMessage, 22 keywords, 18,228 char prompt
